mechanism: The shift from ~+$300-500B/year official-sector Treasury purchases to approximately flat removes a structural buyer, adding an estimated 20-40bp to term premium via Krishnamurthy-Vissing-Jorgensen supply elasticity. This is additive to fiscal issuance pressure.
regime_dependence: Structural shift unlikely to reverse given geopolitical bifurcation and declining petrodollar recycling. Would reverse only under major geopolitical realignment or new reserve accumulation cycle.
